cards.title: Slow dev cycles
cards.body: Rework from late design adds weeks and cost.

cards.title: Fragmented teams
cards.body: Multiple vendors create unclear ownership and delays.

items.q: How long does a typical project take?
items.a: Typical timelines are 8–16 weeks depending on scope: discovery 1–2w, design 2–4w, development 6–12w.
